channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Belle promo sur ce distributeur automatique de croquettes utilisant l’IA qui perd 38 % de sa valeur
item.description: Le Petkit Yumshare Solo est un distributeur automatique de croquettes pour chats et petits chiens avec une caméra de surveillance utilisant l'IA, à retrouver pour 103,55 euros sur Amazon au lieu de 169 euros.

item.title: Our first Google Pixel 11 design leak may have revealed a change coming to the iconic camera bar
item.description: We're counting down to the launch of the Pixel 11 phones later this year, and the camera bar may get a redesign.

item.title: Why this iconic scotch brand is making a whisky for bourbon drinkers
item.description: Johnnie Walker Black Cask is aged entirely in American white oak barrels that once held bourbon. It’s meant to make whisky feel more approachable. Scotch powerhouse Johnnie Walker recently launched the first permanent addition to its main range in 15 years—and it’s aimed at bourbon drinkers.

item.title: The Best MIDI Controllers for Synths, Guitars, and More (2026)
item.description: Want to digitally control your favorite instruments? These tools will help.

item.title: The Corvette ZR1X hybrid can outpace million-dollar sports cars for a fraction of the cost
item.description: When Elon Musk burst onto the scene in his little Tesla Roadster, it seemed a matter of time before electricity rendered gas-powered sports cars obsolete. It hasn't worked out that way. Automakers have struggled to bring purely electric two-seaters to market. The ones that managed to emerge have been flatly rejected by consumers. Porsche has […]

item.title: Sun, surf and seamless signal- stay connected in Bali with Jetpac eSIM, now at a discount
item.description: Sort your mobile data before you arrive, no physical SIMs, no dodgy Wi-Fi.

item.title: MacBook Neo vs iPad 11: which affordable Apple setup should you buy?
item.description: The new MacBook Neo is an affordable laptop that's almost identical in price to an iPad 11 with a Magic Keyboard Folio. So which is best for you?

item.title: Slay the Spire 2, Scott Pilgrim EX and other new indie games worth checking out
item.description: Welcome to our latest roundup of what's going on in the indie game space. We've got a lot of new and upcoming games to highlight this week, and those are on top of all of our coverage of the Nintendo Indie World stream the other day. Nintendo packed a lot of news into that 18-minute stream, including the sudden arrivals of three great games — Blue Prince, Minishoot' Adventures and Öoo — on Switch and/or Switch 2.The company revealed release dates for a bunch of games we've had on our radar, such as InKonbini: One Store. Many Stories (April 30), Mixtape (May 7), Denshattack! (June 17) and Ratat...

item.title: The madness before March Madness: Cinderella teams are born in this week’s conference tournaments
item.description: Two weeks before Selection Sunday, March Madness actually begins with the men’s and women’s conference tournaments. There are 365 teams in Division I men’s college basketball; 363 in women’s college basketball. Only 68 qualify for the NCAA Tournament on each side, and many of those 68 teams in each bracket have already conquered the madness of March....

item.title: Best Mid Layer for Hiking, Backpacking, and Travel (2026)
item.description: Should you get a high-tech jacket like a grid fleece, or stick with tried and true merino wool? We found the warmest, lightest mid layers for your next adventure.

item.title: CBP Used Online Ad Data to Track Phone Locations
item.description: Plus: Proton helped the FBI identify a protester, the Leakbase cybercrime forum was busted in an international operation, and more.

item.title: PSA: Samsung Galaxy S26 preorders end in a few days — here's why it's a good idea to pick up a device now
item.description: Preorders for the new Samsung Galaxy S26 series are officially live — and here are the biggest discounts you'll find anywhere today.

item.title: 01lab : le Galaxy S26 Ultra surpasse-t-il son prédécesseur en terme d’autonomie ?
item.description: Avant la publication du test complet du Galaxy S26 Ultra, le nouveau haut de gamme de Samsung est passé par le 01Lab. En ligne de mire, l’autonomie avec notre nouveau protocole. Résultats ? On vous laisse découvrir.

item.title: J’ai remplacé mon iPhone 11 Pro Max par l’iPhone 17 Pro : voici ce qui a vraiment changé
item.description: Après six ans passés avec mon iPhone 11 Pro Max, j’ai décidé de le remplacer par l’iPhone 17 Pro. Un changement radical sur le papier, plus nuancé à l’usage. Design, performances, ergonomie : voici mon ressenti après un saut de six générations chez Apple.

item.title: How Each Gulf Country Is Intercepting Iranian Missiles and Drones
item.description: As missiles and drones cross the region’s skies, the Gulf’s layered air-defense networks—from THAAD to Patriot batteries—are being tested in real time.

item.title: 6 cheap accessories to make your Apple Watch more useful
item.description: Your Apple Watch is great, but these accessories make it better

item.title: I enjoyed testing this accomplished active stereo speaker system, until it threw in the towel too easily
item.description: The KEF Coda W has plenty to recommend it but the active pair of stereo speakers has involved the brand in an arms race with itself…

item.title: Here are my 5 most anticipated 4K Blu-rays of March 2026
item.description: There are plenty of new and exciting 4K Blu-rays coming in March 2026, but I've picked my personal top 5 I can't wait to test.

item.title: I spent two weeks testing Amazon’s new Echo Studio, and I love the stylish new design — but I’m not sure it’s worth the audio-quality trade-offs
item.description: Amazon’s new, second-generation Echo Studio is powerful yet petite, offering a full retinue of home theatre features and Alexa+ compatibility – but was the trade-off for a smaller form factor worth it?

item.title: ICYMI: the week's 9 biggest tech news stories from Apple's MacBook Neo to launch to Xbox's new console tease
item.description: This week we went to MWC and were treated to some major Nothing and Apple launches including the Apple MacBook Neo.

item.title: States with the most—and least—housing market inventory heading into spring 2026
item.description: ResiClub analyzed inventory data through February 28, 2026. Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter.
